goal: Implement the strict localhost protocol, page bridge, and provider content sidecar while delegating all insertion and submission to the existing legacy adapter.
non_goals: No manifest, background, server, UI, MCP parser, tool execution, or generated-bundle edits.
acceptance_criteria: Only fixed port-3020 localhost origins and allowlisted request schemas cross the page bridge.
Secrets and URL query/hash data are recursively removed from bridge responses.
Auto-send protects user drafts and calls only the active legacy adapter.
Only provider-specific assistant nodes are captured; JSONL user content is never executed.
